'''Imperial ground-skimmers''' were amphibious troop transports used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==History==
These [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] were used to traverse the terrain of harsh swamp worlds like [[Daluuj/Legends|Daluuj]], where at least three were used by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Orlok]] at the [[Imperial Training Center]]. The [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]] encountered three ground-skimmers during a [[Battle of Daluuj|mission]] on Daluuj to rescue [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]].

==Appearances==
*"[[It's a Trap]]" {{Reprint|It's a Trap}} {{1st}}
